assignments.twist: mean-field binary-decision (adopt/not) model with mimetic and contrarian couplings to the mean adoption field, yielding a self-consistent logistic/tanh fixed-point equation like mean-field Ising with a fraction of antiferromagnetic (contrarian) agents

core_model_summary: A mean-field model of binary adoption decisions where agents adopt based on appeal, resistance, and social coupling to the average adoption level, giving a self-consistent sigmoidal fixed-point map with mimetic and contrarian populations.
